final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing the GPT-5.5 launch, with 奥特曼 as the speaker.

Style/medium: needs a high-end China domestic roadshow / GP pitch deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with clear title hierarchy, speaker name, and event context
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch announcement, speaker 奥特曼, and a China domestic fundraising roadshow context
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance stage atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative, forward-looking atmosphere fitting a top-tier GP roadshow — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that balances global tech brand gravitas with China domestic institutional finance tonality — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, print-ready slide surface feel — exact material finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (large, primary headline), "奥特曼" (speaker name), and contextual copy suggesting a China domestic 融资路演 launch event
Constraints: must conform to China domestic roadshow / GP pitch deck visual conventions; slide must read as a credible institutional fundraising cover
Avoid: overly casual or consumer-app aesthetics; avoid anything inconsistent with GP investor audience tonality
